mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM TS_WORK_SW_CONTRACT WHERE CONTRACT_NO IN
#{no}
SELECT CONTRACT_NO FROM TS_WORK_SW_CONTRACT WHERE CONTRACT_NO LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE TS_WORK_SW_CONTRACT SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE CONTRACT_NO = #{contractNo}

UPDATE TS_WORK_SW_CONTRACT SET DELETE_YN = 'Y' WHERE CONTRACT_NO IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TS_WORK_SW_CONTRACT ( CONTRACT_NO, SUB_CD, DEPT_CD, CONTRACT_YEAR, CONTRACT_ST_DT, CONTRACT_ED_DT, REMARK, DELETE_YN, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{contractNo}, #{subCd}, #{deptCd}, #{contractYear}, #{contractStartDate}, #{contractEndDate}, #{remark}, #{deleteYn}, #{regId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TS_WORK_SW_CONTRACT SET DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}, CONTRACT_ST_DT = #{contractStartDate}, CONTRACT_ED_DT = #{contractEndDate}, REMARK = #{remark}, DELETE_YN = #{deleteYn}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE CONTRACT_NO = #{contractNo}
mapper.sql: SELECT c.CONTRACT_YEAR as contractYear, c.CONTRACT_NO as contractNo, c.SUB_CD as subCd, c.DEPT_CD as deptCd, COALESCE(cs.MGR_DEPT_COMP_NM, cust.COMPANY_NM) as customerCompanyNm, cust.COMPANY_CD as customerCompanyCd, COALESCE(cs.MGR_DEPT_BIZ_NM, cust.DEPARTMENT_NM) as customerDepartmentNm, cust.DEPARTMENT_CD as customerDepartmentCd, COALESCE(cs.MGR_DEPT_NM, cust.MANAGE_NM) as customerManageNm, c.DEPT_CD as customerManageCd, COALESCE(cs.PARTNER_COMP_NM, part.COMPANY_NM) as partnerCompanyNm, COALESCE(cs.PARTNER_COMP_CD, p.COMP_CD) as partnerCompanyCd, COALESCE(cs.SW_NM, s.SW_NM) as swName, s.SW_CD as swCode, p.PARTNER_CONTRACT_CD as partnerContractCd, h.HIS_CONTENTS as historyContents, c.CONTRACT_ST_DT as contractStDt, c.CONTRACT_ED_DT as contractEdDt, c.REG_ID as regId, c.REG_DT as regDt FROM TS_WORK_SW_CONTRACT c LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER p ON c.SUB_CD = p.SUB_CD LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SW s ON p.SW_CD = s.SW_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE cust ON c.DEPT_CD = cust.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE part ON p.COMP_CD = part.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN TS_MA_HISTORY h ON c.CONTRACT_NO = h.CONTRACT_NO LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SW_CONTRACT_SUB cs ON c.CONTRACT_NO = cs.CONTRACT_NO WHERE c.DELETE_YN != 'Y'
mapper.select:
AND c.CONTRACT_YEAR = #{contractYear}
AND cust.COMPANY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
AND cust.MANAGE_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{departmentName}, '%')
AND part.COMPANY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{partnerName}, '%')
AND s.SW_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{softwareName}, '%')
AND c.SUB_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{subCode}, '%')
AND part.COMPANY_CD = #{loginUserCompanyCd}
ORDER BY c.REG_DT DESC

SELECT c.CONTRACT_YEAR as contractYear, c.CONTRACT_NO as contractNo, c.SUB_CD as subCd, COALESCE(cs.MGR_DEPT_COMP_NM, cust.COMPANY_NM) as customerCompanyNm, cust.COMPANY_CD as customerCompanyCd, COALESCE(cs.MGR_DEPT_BIZ_NM, cust.DEPARTMENT_NM) as customerDepartmentNm, cust.DEPARTMENT_CD as customerDepartmentCd, COALESCE(cs.MGR_DEPT_NM, cust.MANAGE_NM) as customerManageNm, c.DEPT_CD as customerManageCd, COALESCE(cs.PARTNER_COMP_NM, part.COMPANY_NM) as partnerCompanyNm, COALESCE(cs.PARTNER_COMP_CD, p.COMP_CD) as partnerCompanyCd, COALESCE(cs.SW_NM, s.SW_NM) as swName, s.SW_CD as swCode, c.REMARK as remark, p.PARTNER_CONTRACT_CD as partnerContractCd, c.CONTRACT_ST_DT as contractStDt, c.CONTRACT_ED_DT as contractEdDt, c.REG_ID as regId, c.REG_DT as regDt FROM TS_WORK_SW_CONTRACT c LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER p ON c.SUB_CD = p.SUB_CD LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SW s ON p.SW_CD = s.SW_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE cust ON c.DEPT_CD = cust.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN V_ORGANIZATION_STRUCTURE part ON p.COMP_CD = part.ORIGIN_CD LEFT JOIN TS_WORK_SW_CONTRACT_SUB cs ON c.CONTRACT_NO = cs.CONTRACT_NO WHERE c.CONTRACT_NO = #{contractNo} AND c.DELETE_YN != 'Y'
